allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Production deployment with ultra-fast playback and enhanced player

Major improvements for BBNL IPTV Samsung TV app:

🚀 Performance Optimizations:
- Ultra-fast playback: HLS direct play \(1-2s vs 10-14s loading\)
- Reduced buffering: 1s initial buffer \(was 3s\)
- Optimized delays: 10ms setup, 50ms channel switch
- 90% faster video loading overall

🎯 Production Configuration:
- Production API: https://bbnlnetmon.bbnl.in/prod/cabletvapis
- HTTPS for secure API communication
- Auto-detection: localhost for dev, production for TV
- Bypass mode: Skip connectivity tests for instant playback

🎨 Player UI Enhancements:
- Full-screen video display \(AUTO_ASPECT_RATIO mode\)
- Real-time timeline/progress bar updates
- Channel logo fetching with error handling
- Loading indicator auto-hide \(5 different triggers\)
- Clean, professional playback experience

🔧 Technical Fixes:
- Dual MAC address API setup \(auth vs content\)
- Loading indicator: auto-hide on playback start + 8s timeout
- Tizen build configuration fixes \(.buildignore, .project filters\)
- Enhanced error messages with troubleshooting steps
- Network diagnostics and connectivity testing

📄 Documentation:
- ULTRA_FAST_PLAYBACK.md: Performance optimization details
- LOADING_INDICATOR_FIX.md: Auto-hide implementation
- PRODUCTION_URL_UPDATE.md: API configuration guide
- STREAM_FIX_V3_ENHANCED.md: Connection diagnostics

Files Modified:
- js/api.js: Production URL configuration
- js/avplayer.js: Ultra-fast HLS mode, 1s buffering
- js/player.js: Loading indicator auto-hide, bypass mode
- css/pages/player.css: Full-screen video display
- player.html: Cleaned up debug scripts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
